rule_text: IF env is M AND soc is VH AND gov is H AND mom is L THEN annual_return = VL
IF env is M AND soc is VH AND gov is VH AND mom is L THEN annual_return = H
IF env is H AND soc is L AND gov is VL AND mom is H THEN annual_return = M
IF env is M AND soc is VH AND gov is H AND mom is M THEN annual_return = M
IF env is M AND soc is VH AND gov is VH AND mom is M THEN annual_return = VH
IF env is H AND soc is VL AND gov is VL AND mom is M THEN annual_return = VH
IF env is L AND soc is M AND gov is VH AND mom is VL THEN annual_return = M
IF env is H AND soc is VL AND gov is VL AND mom is VL THEN annual_return = L
IF env is H AND soc is L AND gov is VL AND mom is M THEN annual_return = H
IF env is VL AND soc is M AND gov is L AND mom is VL THEN annual_return = VH
IF env is VL AND soc is M AND gov is H AND mom is VL THEN annual_return = VL
IF env is VH AND soc is M AND gov is M AND mom is L THEN annual_return = VL
